name: antigravity-workflow
description: Antigravity AI: The Next-Gen Liquid Agentic IDE — Powered by the Liquid Swarm Orchestrator, a tri-state adaptive multi-agent kernel with speculative racing, MoA output fusion, per-intent ELO routing, and enterprise-grade air-gapped sandbox

commands.title: Antigravity Task Kernel: 打开控制面板
Antigravity Task Kernel: 启动任务
Antigravity Task Kernel: 查看当前任务
Antigravity Task Kernel: 实时查看任务
Antigravity Task Kernel: 取消当前任务
Antigravity Task Kernel: 切换 ArkTS LSP
LSO: 🧬 三态蜂群分析 (Swarm Analyze)
LSO: 🛡️ 红队验证 (Red Team Verify)

LSO: 🔒 物理隔离部署 (Air-Gap Deploy)

arkts.deveco.path.description: 自定义 DevEco Studio 安装路径（留空则自动检测）

arkts.trace.server.description: LSP 通信日志级别（调试用）

antigravity._dashboardTip.default: 👉 点击右下角 'Antigravity Workflow' 打开控制面板 👈
antigravity._dashboardTip.description: 💡 Antigravity workflow 与 ArkTS LSP 控制都在可视化控制面中。请点击右下角状态栏按钮，或使用 Cmd+Shift+P → 'Antigravity Workflow: 打开控制面板'。

antigravity.defaultModel.description: 默认路由大模型（未触发垂直分支时的兜底模型）

antigravity.retentionDays.description: 自动清理历史记录的天数

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:all && npm run build --prefix packages/antigravity-webview && mkdir -p dist && esbuild ./src/extension.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/extension.js --external:vscode --format=cjs --platform=node --minify && esbuild ./packages/antigravity-mcp-server/src/main.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/antigravity-mcp-server.js --format=cjs --platform=node --minify && esbuild ./packages/antigravity-taskd/src/main.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/antigravity-taskd.js --format=cjs --platform=node --minify && cp node_modules/sql.js/dist/sql-wasm.wasm dist/
scripts.install-ext: npx vsce package --no-dependencies -o antigravity-workflow.vsix && code --install-extension antigravity-workflow.vsix && rm antigravity-workflow.vsix && cp dist/webview.js dist/extension.js dist/antigravity-mcp-server.js dist/antigravity-taskd.js ~/.antigravity/extensions/like3213934360-lab.antigravity-workflow-0.3.0/dist/ 2>/dev/null; echo '✅ Installed to both VS Code & Antigravity'
scripts.build:runtime: npm run build --prefix packages/antigravity-shared && npm run build --prefix packages/antigravity-core && npm run build --prefix packages/antigravity-persistence
scripts.build:antigravity-model: npm run build --prefix packages/antigravity-model-shared && npm run build --prefix packages/antigravity-model-core
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix packages/ace-bridge && npm run build:runtime && npm run build:antigravity-model && npm run build:antigravity-taskd && npm run build:antigravity-vscode && npm run build:antigravity-mcp
scripts.typecheck:runtime: npm run typecheck --prefix packages/antigravity-shared && npm run typecheck --prefix packages/antigravity-core && npm run typecheck --prefix packages/antigravity-persistence
scripts.typecheck:antigravity-model: npm run typecheck --prefix packages/antigravity-model-shared && npm run typecheck --prefix packages/antigravity-model-core
scripts.check:source-artifacts: if find packages src -path '*/src/*' \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.js.map' -o -name '*.d.ts' -o -name '*.d.ts.map' \) | grep -q .; then echo 'Source tree contains generated artifacts under src/'; find packages src -path '*/src/*' \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.js.map' -o -name '*.d.ts' -o -name '*.d.ts.map' \) | sort; exit 1; fi
scripts.typecheck:all: npm run check:source-artifacts && npm run typecheck:ace-bridge && npm run typecheck:runtime && npm run typecheck:antigravity-model && npm run typecheck:antigravity-taskd && npm run typecheck:antigravity-vscode && npm run typecheck:antigravity-mcp && npm run clean:dist-tests
scripts.smoke:mcp: npm run build:runtime && npm run build:antigravity-model && npm run build:antigravity-taskd && npm run build:antigravity-mcp && npm run smoke --prefix packages/antigravity-mcp-server
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck:all && npm test && npm run build
